generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our allies are shirking their defense commitments. The data is clear: only 8 of 30 allies meet the 2% GDP defense spending target. Meanwhile, our tax dollars keep subsidizing their security. We need to hold these nations accountable or reconsider our unconditional support. The alternative? A more isolated America facing rising threats alone. #StrongerAlliances #AccountabilityFirst
